title: The Pipeline Builder
instructions: Decompose the task 'Analyze a company and produce an investment memo' into 4-6 chained prompts. Each prompt's output feeds into the next. Your pipeline should take raw company information as input and produce a polished investment memo as final output. Design each step to be focused on a single responsibility. The pipeline will be evaluated on the quality of the final memo and how well intermediate steps contribute to it.

test_cases.input:
Company: TechFlow Analytics
Founded: 2019
Headquarters: Austin, TX
Employees: 340
Industry: B2B SaaS — data analytics platform

Financials:
- 2023 Revenue: $28M (up from $15M in 2022)
- 2024 Revenue (projected): $52M
- Gross Margin: 78%
- Net Loss: -$8M (2023), improving from -$14M (2022)
- Burn Rate: $1.2M/month
- Cash on Hand: $35M (Series B raised $40M in Jan 2023)
- CAC: $12,000, LTV: $85,000, LTV/CAC ratio: 7.1x
- Net Revenue Retention: 135%

Product:
- Self-serve analytics platform for mid-market companies
- Natural language query interface (AI-powered)
- Integrates with 50+ data sources (Salesforce, HubSpot, Snowflake, BigQuery, etc.)
- Recently launched 'AutoInsights' — automated anomaly detection and alerting
- SOC 2 Type II certified, HIPAA compliant

Customers:
- 420 paying customers (up from 180 in 2022)
- Notable: Shopify, DoorDash, Stripe, HubSpot (mid-market divisions)
- 96% of customers are on annual contracts
- Average contract value (ACV): $67,000
- Churn rate: 4% annually

Team:
- CEO: Sarah Chen (ex-Tableau VP Engineering, 15 years in analytics)
- CTO: Marcus Rodriguez (ex-Google, built BigQuery Omni)
- VP Sales: Jennifer Park (ex-Snowflake, built their mid-market team from 0 to $80M)
- 120 engineers, 80 in sales/marketing, 40 in G&A
- Glassdoor rating: 4.3/5, 89% would recommend to a friend

Market & Competition:
- TAM: $45B (business intelligence and analytics)
- Competitors: Tableau (Salesforce), Looker (Google), Power BI (Microsoft), ThoughtSpot, Domo
- Differentiation: AI-native approach, 10x faster time-to-insight, self-serve (no SQL needed)
- Market growing at 12% CAGR through 2028

Risks:
- Competition from well-funded incumbents (Tableau, Looker, Power BI)
- Concentration risk: top 10 customers = 25% of revenue
- Burn rate requires additional fundraising within 24 months
- Key person risk on CTO (core AI architecture)
- Regulatory uncertainty around AI/ML in data analytics

Recent News:
- Won 'Best AI Analytics Tool 2024' at SaaStr Annual
- Partnership with Snowflake for native integration
- Launched in EU market (Q2 2024), early traction with 30 customers
- Rumored acquisition interest from Salesforce and Databricks

quality_criteria: Uses specific numbers from the input (not generic statements)
Financial analysis includes unit economics evaluation (CAC, LTV, NRR)
Risk assessment is balanced (acknowledges both risks and mitigants)
Investment recommendation is clear with a specific thesis
Final output reads as a cohesive, professional memo
Reasoning is supported by data from the company description
expected_output_rubric.format: Professional investment memo with clear section headers, data-driven analysis, and a clear BUY/PASS/WATCH recommendation

pipeline_steps.name: Company Overview Extraction
pipeline_steps.description: Extract and organize key company facts into a structured summary

pipeline_steps.name: Financial Analysis
pipeline_steps.description: Analyze financial metrics, unit economics, growth trajectory, and financial health

pipeline_steps.name: Competitive Landscape
pipeline_steps.description: Map competitive positioning, differentiation, moats, and market dynamics

pipeline_steps.name: Risk Assessment
pipeline_steps.description: Identify, categorize, and assess severity of risks with potential mitigants

pipeline_steps.name: Investment Recommendation
pipeline_steps.description: Synthesize all analyses into a clear investment thesis and recommendation

pipeline_steps.name: Format as Memo
pipeline_steps.description: Compile everything into a polished, professional investment memo

metadata.description: Full company analysis pipeline — tests decomposition, data flow, and synthesis quality
